title: lithospermum strictum
intro: Lithospermum strictum, also known as Greek valerian or blue dragon, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing anxiety and insomnia, as well as improving respiratory and cardiovascular health. Lithospermum strictum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
